title: JM's Fixes
description: Updates and fixes many aspects of Minecraft's art style
body:
![The title "Minecraft JM's Fixes" in the same style as minecrafts title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/68457140bf3223d647a69ea549ef328826c3ee96.png)

Many item, block, and mob textures were left unchanged after the 1.14 texture update. This recoursepack is a collection of texture and model updates/tweaks to bring everything in line with Minecraft's modern style.

## **Reccomended Resourcepacks**
[OreUI Recreation](https://modrinth.com/project/MKgZqBek)

[Sexy Stev's Bussin' Banners](https://modrinth.com/project/WYBNdPrC)

[Dark OreUI Recreation](https://modrinth.com/project/ASmjbPX0)

[Cube Nautilus Shell](https://modrinth.com/project/D48FZUlx)

I'm not exactly an artist so all the "new" textures are just edited versions of other textures. I'm having trouble making new textures for fire, lava, water, stripped logs, banners, shield banners, nether portal, ghast, wither, elder guardian and ender dragon so if they look a bit odd, thats why.

Contact me [here](https://bsky.app/profile/josephmamah9272.bsky.social) for questions and suggestions.
